businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for activity level (1.0 for sedentary, 1.5 for active, 2.0 for athlete)

inputs.label: Goal Multiplier

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for goal (1.0 for maintenance, 1.2 for muscle gain, 0.9 for weight loss)
